assertion_results.text: Description includes a Motivation section that explains the root cause (non-atomic read-then-update causing duplicate processing)
assertion_results.evidence: Description explains 'acquireJob used two separate queries (SELECT then UPDATE) instead of an atomic operation' — root cause is present though not in a dedicated Motivation section

assertion_results.text: Description references the support tickets (SUPPORT-891, SUPPORT-894, SUPPORT-897) or the customer impact (duplicate emails)
assertion_results.evidence: Last line states 'Fixes SUPPORT-891, SUPPORT-894, SUPPORT-897'

assertion_results.text: Description includes a Testing Instructions section with steps to run the concurrent stress test
assertion_results.evidence: Testing section says 'Run npm test to verify everything passes. The new concurrent acquisition test spawns 10 workers to verify only one gets the job.' — mentions the test exists but doesn't provide steps to run it specifically

assertion_results.text: Description includes a Rollback Plan section
assertion_results.evidence: No rollback plan section present in the description

assertion_results.text: Description includes a Reviewer Notes section that flags the atomic query change as needing careful review
assertion_results.evidence: No reviewer notes section. The description doesn't guide reviewers on what to focus on.

assertion_results.text: Description mentions the payment processing implication as a risk or area needing attention
assertion_results.evidence: No mention of payment processing implications anywhere in the description

assertion_results.text: Testing instructions mention running the new regression tests specifically (not just 'run the tests')
assertion_results.evidence: Testing section says 'Run npm test' — generic command, doesn't specify the new test file

assertion_results.text: Changes section explains the fix conceptually (atomic operation replacing two-step read-update) not just which files changed
assertion_results.evidence: Changes section explains 'Changed the job acquisition to use UPDATE...RETURNING instead of separate SELECT and UPDATE queries'
